text:
- Update to 1.0
- Use ports framework for build:
    Bonus: Now honours CC/CFLAGS/LDFLAGS
- Remove DISTNAME override
- Update LICENSE (GPLv2 not GPLv1)
- Mark MAKE_JOBS_SAFE
- Patch Makefile to see $(CC) not "CC" when not verbose
- Pet portlint (LICENSE order)

Changes:

http://hostap.epitest.fi/gitweb/gitweb.cgi?p=hostap.git;a=blob_plain;f=hostapd/ChangeLog

Added file(s):
- files/patch-hostapd__Makefile

Port maintainer (leres@ee.lbl.gov) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: update, diff: ports)
